name: Krea Turbo SVDQuant
description: A 4-bit (W4A4) SVDQuant build of the Krea Turbo diffusion transformer, packaged for the Nunchaku runtime. SVDQuant pushes both weights and activations down to 4-bit while absorbing the resulting outliers with a low-rank branch, so the model keeps near-FP16 image quality at roughly a quarter of the memory and a sizeable inference speed-up. Turbo distillation on top means high-fidelity text-to-image generation in just a handful of sampling steps, making it practical to run on consumer GPUs.

name: Krea 2 Depth ControlNet
description: A depth-conditioned ControlNet for the Krea 2 diffusion model, letting you steer text-to-image generation with a depth map so the output respects the spatial layout and 3D structure of a reference. Feed in a depth map (from an existing image or a depth estimator) alongside your prompt and the ControlNet keeps foreground/background relationships and object placement intact while the base model handles style and content, making it well suited for consistent scene composition, relighting, and structure-preserving image variations.
